info.title: Chess API
info.description:
This API is used to communicate with Oredo Api.

# Authentication

Authentication standard that are being used is Oauth2. There are 2 [Grant Types](https://oauth.net/2/grant-types/) that are being used in this API.

## Password Grant

The Password grant type is used by first-party clients to exchange a user's credentials for an access token. Most of the APIs requires to have access token tied to certain user. By using the access token, we can recognize the user.

## Client Credential Grant

The Client Credentials grant type is used by clients to obtain an access token outside of the context of a user. Some of the APIs doesn't require to have user such as getting website information, registering new player, etc.

# General Request

## GET Request

All of GET request parameters will be included in query string

## POST Request

All of POST request parameters must be added inside Body -> Raw in JSON format.

# General Response

All reponse will be in JSON format. With at least parameters :

- `success` in boolean
    
- `messages` in string
    

## Success Response

All success

post.description: Retrieving access token in exchange of user and password.

application/json.example:
{
    "game_type": "All", //Domino / DominoTagTeam. Default : All
    "status":"2, 1, 4", // Status: 0 = schedule, 1 = start, 2 = end, 3 = reg closed, 4 = canceled, 5 = upcoming. seperate using to multiple filter
    "page" : 1,
    "pagination" : 20, //default 10,
    "name" : "", //for search tournament by name,
    "date" : "", //filter by date
    "slot_available" : "", // filter tournament slot available for register 1 available, 0 full, default : All
    "is_register" : null

}

post.description:
Validate password reset token sent via email

# Parameters

## URL Params 

api/v1/users/password/token/{whitelabelCode}

| Params        | Type           | Mandatory  | Desc | Sample |
| ------- |:-------------:| -----:| ----- | ---- |
| `whitelabelCode` | string |  Yes | White label code | aaaaaa | 

## JSON Params

| Params        | Type           | Mandatory  | Desc | Sample |
| ------- |:-------------:| -----:| ----- | ---- |
| `token` | string |  Yes | Password reset token sent via email, generated by `Reset Password` API | cloud | 
| `domain` | string | Yes | Website domain | domain.app |

Register new user into whitelabel website. 

# Parameters

## JSON Params

| Params        | Type           | Mandatory  | Desc | Sample |
| ------- |:-------------:| -----:| ----- | ---- |
| `username` | string |  Yes | Username | aaaaaa | 
| `password` | string | Yes | user password | secret|
| `password_confirmation` | string | Yes | user password confirmatiion | secret |

Reset password and send token to email

# Parameters

## URL Params 

api/v1/users/password/reset/{whitelabelCode}

| Params        | Type           | Mandatory  | Desc | Sample |
| ------- |:-------------:| -----:| ----- | ---- |
| `whitelabelCode` | string |  Yes | White label code | aaaaaa | 

## JSON Params

| Params        | Type           | Mandatory  | Desc | Sample |
| ------- |:-------------:| -----:| ----- | ---- |
| `username` | string |  Yes | Username | cloud | 
| `domain` | string | Yes | Website domain | domain.app |

Reset password and send token to email

# Parameters

## URL Params

| Params        | Type           | Mandatory  | Desc | Sample |

## JSON Params

| `username` | string |  Yes | Username | cloud | 
| `domain` | string | Yes | Website domain | domain.app |

## JSON Params

| `domain` | string | Yes | Website domain | domain.app |
